name: Classic Beats
explanation: A four-voice sample-based drum machine in the spirit of the early-'80s sampled rhythm boxes. Real kick, snare, closed hi-hat and clap one-shots — all CC0 / public-domain recordings — are baked into the plugin and triggered polyphonically, with each incoming MIDI note mapped to a voice (note number modulo four) so every key plays a hit. Per-voice levels plus Tone, Decay and Drive shape the groove.
